description: Claude Code shared settings (canonical three-level nested hook format with matcher field). Bootstrap canonical: repo-root CLAUDE.md (Claude Code auto-load) → CORE_BOOTSTRAP.md (companion) → runtime/core-bootstrap.yaml (executable contract, projected to runtime.db generated_surfaces). User-specific permissions and overrides live in .claude/settings.local.json (gitignored). Hooks: 5 Claude Code events (SessionStart / UserPromptSubmit / PreToolUse / PostToolUse / Stop) all delegate to the Go binary scripts/ai-skill-cli/bin/ai-skill-<os>-<arch> for cross-platform parity (no bash/python/jq required at runtime). The inline `sh -c` wrapper detects OS/arch via `uname` and selects the right binary; this wrapper itself is the only POSIX-shell dependency. Per plans/archived/2026-05-21-0834-cross-platform-go-script-runtime.md cross-platform Go script runtime policy. Diagnostic logs at /tmp/ai-skill-*-hook.log.

hooks.command: sh -c 'ROOT="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(pwd)}"; case "$(uname -s 2>/dev/null | tr A-Z a-z)" in darwin) os=darwin ;; linux) os=linux ;; mingw*|msys*|cygwin*) os=windows ;; *) os=unknown ;; esac; arch="$(uname -m 2>/dev/null || echo unknown)"; case "$arch" in arm64|aarch64) arch=arm64 ;; x86_64|amd64) arch=amd64 ;; esac; suffix=""; [ "$os" = "windows" ] && suffix=".exe"; exec "$ROOT/scripts/ai-skill-cli/bin/ai-skill-$os-$arch$suffix" hooks run session-start --repo "$ROOT"'

sh -c 'ROOT="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(pwd)}"; case "$(uname -s 2>/dev/null | tr A-Z a-z)" in darwin) os=darwin ;; linux) os=linux ;; mingw*|msys*|cygwin*) os=windows ;; *) os=unknown ;; esac; arch="$(uname -m 2>/dev/null || echo unknown)"; case "$arch" in arm64|aarch64) arch=arm64 ;; x86_64|amd64) arch=amd64 ;; esac; suffix=""; [ "$os" = "windows" ] && suffix=".exe"; exec "$ROOT/scripts/ai-skill-cli/bin/ai-skill-$os-$arch$suffix" hooks run user-prompt-submit --repo "$ROOT"'

sh -c 'ROOT="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(pwd)}"; case "$(uname -s 2>/dev/null | tr A-Z a-z)" in darwin) os=darwin ;; linux) os=linux ;; mingw*|msys*|cygwin*) os=windows ;; *) os=unknown ;; esac; arch="$(uname -m 2>/dev/null || echo unknown)"; case "$arch" in arm64|aarch64) arch=arm64 ;; x86_64|amd64) arch=amd64 ;; esac; suffix=""; [ "$os" = "windows" ] && suffix=".exe"; exec "$ROOT/scripts/ai-skill-cli/bin/ai-skill-$os-$arch$suffix" hooks run pre-tool-use --repo "$ROOT"'

sh -c 'ROOT="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(pwd)}"; case "$(uname -s 2>/dev/null | tr A-Z a-z)" in darwin) os=darwin ;; linux) os=linux ;; mingw*|msys*|cygwin*) os=windows ;; *) os=unknown ;; esac; arch="$(uname -m 2>/dev/null || echo unknown)"; case "$arch" in arm64|aarch64) arch=arm64 ;; x86_64|amd64) arch=amd64 ;; esac; suffix=""; [ "$os" = "windows" ] && suffix=".exe"; exec "$ROOT/scripts/ai-skill-cli/bin/ai-skill-$os-$arch$suffix" hooks run post-tool-use --repo "$ROOT"'

sh -c 'ROOT="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(pwd)}"; case "$(uname -s 2>/dev/null | tr A-Z a-z)" in darwin) os=darwin ;; linux) os=linux ;; mingw*|msys*|cygwin*) os=windows ;; *) os=unknown ;; esac; arch="$(uname -m 2>/dev/null || echo unknown)"; case "$arch" in arm64|aarch64) arch=arm64 ;; x86_64|amd64) arch=amd64 ;; esac; suffix=""; [ "$os" = "windows" ] && suffix=".exe"; exec "$ROOT/scripts/ai-skill-cli/bin/ai-skill-$os-$arch$suffix" hooks run stop --repo "$ROOT"'
